title: cracca platycarpa
side_effects: Cracca platycarpa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. In some cases, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. If ingested in large quantities, Cracca platycarpa can cause kidney damage and even organ failure in severe cases.
